name: Memory (Rembr)
description: OpenClaw memory plugin backed by Rembr: persistent, structured, cross-agent memory with auto-recall and auto-capture. Embeddings are handled server-side by Rembr.

url.label: Rembr Server URL
url.help: Rembr MCP endpoint; point at your own instance if self-hosting

apiKey.label: Rembr API Key
apiKey.help: API key for Rembr; supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion. Falls back to the REMBR_API_KEY environment variable.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant Rembr memories into context before each agent turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store memory-worthy user statements to Rembr after each turn

minSimilarity.label: Min Similarity
minSimilarity.help: Minimum similarity score for recall results

recallMaxChars.label: Recall Query Max Chars
recallMaxChars.help: Maximum prompt/query length sent for memory recall

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture

customTriggers.label: Custom Triggers
customTriggers.help: Literal phrases that should make auto-capture consider a message memory-worthy

defaultCategory.label: Default Category
defaultCategory.help: Rembr category used when none can be detected
